data.title: Benchmark Cuts Coinbase Target to $285 but Sees “Maturity Milestone” in Fundamentals
data.description:
Benchmark has lowered its price target on Coinbase from $450 to $285, a 37% reduction, while maintaining a Buy (Speculative Buy) rating.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/benchmark-cuts-coinbase-target-to-285-but-sees-maturity-milestone-in-fundamentals/

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | U.S. Acknowledges Global Assessments on Navalny Poisoning
data.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has stated that the United States is aware of international evaluations regarding the poisoning of prominent Russian opposition politician Alexei Navalny. According to Jin10, the U.S. does not question these assessments and sees no reason to challenge them.

data.title: Amberdata: WLFI may be an "early warning sign" of a crypto market collapse.
data.description: According to a research report by data provider Amberdata, WLFI demonstrated a significant early warning effect during the massive market liquidation on October 10, 2025. More than five hours before approximately $6.93 billion in leveraged positions were liquidated across the network, WLFI had already begun to decline sharply, while Bitcoin's price remained around $121,000, showing no significant pressure. The research suggests that because many trading platforms supported WLFI as collateral, the token's sharp fluctuations led to a devaluation of the collateral, forcing traders to liquidate BTC and ETH to cover their positions, thus triggering a chain reaction across the market. Mike Marshall of Amberdata stated that this five-hour lead time is difficult to consider a coincidence, as WLFI's high leverage makes it more sensitive to market pressures. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Hyperliquid Whale Positions Reach $2.9 Billion, Coinglass Data Shows
data.description:
Hyperliquid platform's whale positions currently total $2.9 billion, according to Coinglass data. According to ChainCatcher, long positions amount to $1.401 billion, representing 48.32% of the total, while short positions stand at $1.499 billion, accounting for 51.68%. Long positions have incurred a loss of $108 million, whereas short positions have gained $216 million.

Notably, a whale address, 0x6c85..f6, engaged in a 20x leveraged long position on ETH at a price of $2029.38, is currently facing an unrealized loss of $858,800.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 620 USDT with a 1.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 15, 2026, 12:58 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 620 USDT and is now trading at 619.75 USDT, with a narrowed 1.32% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Tesla Faces Delays in CarPlay Integration Due to iOS Compatibility Issues
data.description: Tesla's integration of CarPlay has been postponed due to compatibility issues that need to be addressed in iOS 26. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by Tesla in implementing the popular Apple feature into its vehicles. The delay stems from technical difficulties that require resolution in the upcoming iOS update. Tesla's decision to incorporate CarPlay aims to enhance user experience by providing seamless connectivity between Apple devices and Tesla's infotainment system. However, the current compatibility issues have necessitated a pause in the rollout until the necessary updates are made. This development underscores the complexities involved in integrating third-party software into automotive systems, which often require synchronization with software updates from tech companies like Apple. As Tesla works to resolve these issues, the anticipated integration of CarPlay remains on hold, awaiting further advancements in iOS technology.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Guotai Junan UBS Fund Adjusts Valuation Amid Silver Market Volatility
data.description: Guotai Junan UBS Fund Management Co., Ltd. has announced a valuation adjustment for its silver futures securities investment fund (LOF) due to recent extreme price movements in the silver market. According to Jin10, the company aims to ensure fair treatment for all investors and prevent preferential redemption advantages. The announcement has garnered significant attention from investors, prompting the company to swiftly organize and implement a comprehensive work plan. The plan, designed to protect the legal rights of investors, particularly small and medium-sized ones, follows principles of stratification and reliability. The scope of the plan applies to natural person investors redeeming the fund based on the net value confirmed on February 2, 2026, including redemption applications submitted between January 30, 2026, at 15:00 and February 2, 2026, at 15:00. Institutional investors are not included in this adjustment.

data.description: On Feb 15, 2026, 12:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 70,000 USDT and is now trading at 69,963.851563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Transatlantic Relations Discussed at Munich Security Conference
data.description:
The Munich Security Conference recently focused on the evolving dynamics of transatlantic relations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the discussions that centered around the geopolitical shifts affecting Europe and the United States. Key topics included defense strategies, economic cooperation, and the impact of global challenges on the alliance.

Participants at the conference emphasized the importance of maintaining strong ties between Europe and the U.S. amid rising global tensions. The discussions also addressed the need for collaborative approaches to address security threats and economic uncertainties.

The conference served as a platform for leaders and experts to exchange views on how to navigate the complexities of international relations in the current geopolitical climate. The emphasis was on fostering unity and resilience in the face of shared challenges.

data.title: A whale holding $126 million worth of ETH withdrew another 7,301 ETH from OKX.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0x28eF) that previously held 60,784 ETH (worth $126 million) has bought ETH again. In the past 8 hours, this address has withdrawn 7,301 ETH from OKX, worth $15.14 million.

data.title: Michael Saylor Indicates Potential Increase in Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
Crypto Rover posted on X that Michael Saylor, the prominent Bitcoin advocate and co-founder of MicroStrategy, has suggested the possibility of acquiring additional Bitcoin. This announcement comes amid ongoing discussions about the cryptocurrency's market dynamics and potential future growth.

Saylor, known for his bullish stance on Bitcoin, has consistently emphasized the digital asset's value as a long-term investment. His company, MicroStrategy, has been one of the largest corporate holders of Bitcoin, frequently making headlines with its substantial purchases.

The hint at further acquisitions aligns with Saylor's strategy of leveraging Bitcoin as a hedge against inflation and economic uncertainty. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, Saylor's comments may influence investor sentiment and market trends.

While specific details regarding the timing or scale of potential purchases were not disclosed, Saylor's remarks underscore his ongoing commitment to Bitcoin. The cryptocurrency community is closely monitoring these developments, anticipating possible impacts on Bitcoin's price and market activity.

data.title: Michael Saylor has released another Bitcoin Tracker update; he may disclose his accumulating data next week.
data.description: Strategy founder Michael Saylor has once again posted information about Bitcoin Trackers on the X platform, and may disclose data on his increased holdings next week.

data.title: Russia's Dependence on Foreign Fighters Grows Amid Ukraine Conflict
data.description: Russia is increasingly turning to foreign fighters to bolster its military efforts in Ukraine, according to UK Defence Secretary John Healey. Bloomberg posted on X that this shift comes as Russian forces face mounting losses that exceed their ability to replenish troops. The reliance on external combatants highlights the challenges Russia faces in sustaining its military operations in the ongoing conflict.

data.title: Indian police arrest six suspects in a week-long crackdown
data.description:
The Indian police arrested six individuals due to fraudulent activities, including investment fraud, loan app fraud, and part-time jobs scams.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indian-police-arrest-six-suspects/

data.title: He Yi commented on an interview with the former head of listings at Binance: Chase was not a listing manager and had no decision-making power.
data.description: Regarding the recent trending interview with "Chase, former head of listing at Binance," He Yi posted on the X platform, stating: "He wasn't a listing manager, he was a Business Development (BD) person. Binance's listing team, which handles project analysis and due diligence, doesn't communicate directly with project teams. Contract terms are handled by the BD team, but they have no decision-making power. Therefore, each BD person needs to establish connections with countless projects. Listing and BD are handled by two separate teams with different reporting lines. Thank you for your attention. It's good to have different perspectives to help people make judgments; there's no need to over-interpret yesterday's decisions for today's outcome."

data.title: Bitcoin consolidates; Fidelity's Timmer flags $60K support
data.description:
Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer outlines a $60K–$75K support zone, while data cites a potential $55K wick, framing whether the Bitcoin bear market bottom is in.
source: https://coincu.com/news/bitcoin-consolidates-fidelitys-timmer-flags-60k-support/

data.title: Binance Defends Its Role in October 10 Market Crash
data.description:
At the February 12, 2026 session of Consensus Hong Kong 2026, Binance Co-CEO Richard Teng directly addressed the October 10, 2025 “10/10” market collapse, framing the event as a macro-driven liquidation cascade rather than a platform-specific breakdown. The crash triggered approximately $19.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-defends-its-role-in-october-10-market-crash/

data.title: Bitcoin Futures Show Institutional Bullishness Amid Market Dynamics
data.description: US institutional investors continue to exhibit a bullish stance on Bitcoin, as evidenced by a higher annualized basis on CME futures compared to offshore options markets, where interest appears to be waning. According to NS3.AI, the recent decline in Bitcoin prices to $60,000 lacks evidence of being linked to threats from quantum computing. Instead, stocks associated with quantum computing are moving in tandem with Bitcoin, rather than inversely. These market dynamics suggest a broader decline in risk appetite affecting growth assets, with fears surrounding quantum computing likely fueled by market hype rather than genuine fundamental threats.

data.title: XRP Surges Over 8% as Ripple CEO Joins CFTC Advisory Committee
data.description: XRP's price experienced a significant increase of over 8% after Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse was appointed to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission's (CFTC) Innovation Advisory Committee. According to NS3.AI, this development marks a closer alignment between Ripple and U.S. regulators, potentially indicating a shift in the regulatory landscape for cryptocurrencies. The appointment has sparked growing institutional interest, underscored by Goldman Sachs' substantial $152 million holdings in crypto ETFs, which further supports XRP's upward momentum.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Urge CFIUS to Investigate UAE Investment in WLFI
data.description: U.S. Senators Elizabeth Warren and Andy Kim have called on the Treasury Department to investigate a $50 million investment by the United Arab Emirates in WLFI. According to Bitalk News, the transaction has connections to the Trump family, raising concerns about national security and foreign influence. The lawmakers are urging the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) to scrutinize the deal to ensure it does not compromise U.S. interests. The involvement of foreign entities in American businesses, especially those linked to political figures, has prompted heightened scrutiny from both parties in Congress.
